## Description

Brief description of changes.

## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --check` passes
- [ ] `bun run check` passes (if frontend changes)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented in description)

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots for UI changes.
